text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, is there anything you'd like to eat for
lunch this weekend?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're roommates, I wanted to cook us a
meal to celebrate. ♪ What would you like?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...You don't need to do that. I eat my meals
alone.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, is... is that so? I... see.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's just so many foods I'd like you to try. I put
quite a lot of thought into the menu...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I see now that I was getting ahead of myself. I
apologize...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I... don't have any preferences. I'll eat whatever
you came up with, so just make that.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Taishin! All right. ♪ Hehe... I'll make this the best
lunch you've ever had!
